overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world western game showing a character running along a dry grassy hillside trail. The environment features arid terrain with scattered cacti, shrubs, and trees, opening up to reveal a vast desert valley with distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: arid hillside trail with desert vegetation

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the dirt trail through dry grass and scrub vegetation

entered.detail: dry brown grass covering the hillside ground
green cacti with flat pads growing beside the trail
low bushes and dry shrubs scattered across the hillside
large boulder formation beside the trail
distant mountain peaks under the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow dirt trail through arid grassland. Prickly pear cacti and scrub bushes dot the landscape, with a large rock formation passing by on the right. Distant mountains rise under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ridge trail with emerging valley views

events.description: trail opens up to reveal distant desert valley views to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the ridge as the terrain opens up and valley becomes visible

entered.detail: cluster of tall trees with white bark on the right hillside
large rocky cliff face on the right side of the trail
vast arid valley beginning to open up in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a widening ridge trail as the landscape opens up. Tall trees appear on the right near a rocky cliff face, while the scrub vegetation falls behind. A glimpse of the distant desert valley becomes visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with panoramic valley opening

events.description: valley view expands significantly as the character rounds the ridge

agents.ego_description: running along the ridge edge with the valley expanding into full view

segments.scene_description: Running along the mountain ridge, the scene opens dramatically to reveal a vast desert valley below. The rocky cliff and trees recede into the distance on the right as the panoramic view expands, showing arid terrain stretching to the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with expansive desert vista

events.description: full vista of the desert valley with distant rock formations becomes visible

agents.ego_description: running along the overlook with the expansive valley and rock formations fully visible

entered.detail: distinctive rock outcrops and mesas visible in the distant valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along the mountain overlook, now fully revealing the expansive desert valley below. Distant rock formations and mesas punctuate the arid landscape, with mountain ranges framing the horizon under the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a narrow hillside path into a sweeping panoramic overlook of a desert valley. It begins with the character running through arid grassland dotted with prickly pear cacti and scrub bushes, passing a large rock formation under a partly cloudy sky. As the trail widens along a ridge, the scrub vegetation gives way to tall trees and a rocky cliff face, while the first glimpses of a distant valley emerge to the left. The scene then opens dramatically as the character reaches the mountain crest, causing the cliff and trees to recede and revealing a vast, arid expanse stretching toward the horizon. Finally, the view expands fully across the mountain overlook to showcase a wide desert landscape punctuated by distant mesas and framing mountain ranges under a bright sky.
